scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n agent,app -c blue,green "cd agent && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 AGENT_LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG uv run python agent.py" "cd app && bun run dev"
scripts.dev:local-cpk: LOCAL_COPILOTKIT=../../CopilotKit/packages concurrently --kill-others -n agent,app -c blue,green "cd agent && LOCAL_COPILOTKIT=1 PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 AGENT_LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG uv run python agent.py" "cd app && bun run dev"
scripts.dev:local-cpk-agent: concurrently --kill-others -n agent,app -c blue,green "cd agent && LOCAL_COPILOTKIT=1 PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 AGENT_LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG uv run python agent.py" "cd app && bun run dev"
